task_completion.description: Log into OpenClinica and select the correct study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica web interface is visible and logged in. The active study shown in the interface is 'Phase II Diabetes Trial'.

task_completion.description: Include the Vital Signs CRF items from the Baseline Assessment event in the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Create Dataset' or 'View Dataset' screens, the selected items explicitly include the 'Vital Signs' CRF under the 'Baseline Assessment' event.
The dataset name is entered or displayed as 'DM2024_Interim_Vitals' in the dataset properties, save screen, or dataset list.

task_completion.description: Export the dataset in CSV or tab-delimited format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export data screen shows the dataset being exported, with either CSV or tab-delimited format selected.

task_completion.description: Download the resulting data file to /home/ga/Downloads.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or browser download history shows the exported dataset file successfully downloaded to the `/home/ga/Downloads` directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to create and export the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenClinica web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, database queries, or scripts to extract the data.

integrity.description: The file was genuinely downloaded from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The downloaded file appears in the browser's download manager or save dialog, rather than being manually created in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type the dataset contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent manually typing the dataset contents or subject IDs (DM-101, DM-102, DM-103) into a file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (DM-TRIAL-2024). Expected Dataset Name: 'DM2024_Interim_Vitals'. Required Event: 'Baseline Assessment'. Required CRF: 'Vital Signs'. Subjects in data: DM-101, DM-102, DM-103.
